title: Create my listing on Back Market's Back Office
bodyHtml:
In this article, we will explain you step by step how to create a listing on your Back Office.

  • Go on the 'Offers' tab in your Back Office or use directly this link.
  • Then, click on "Create an offer"

  • Use the search bar to find the product you're selling:

  • If the product already exists in our catalog, click on 'Sell yours'.

💡 If the product doesn't exist in our catalog, you can duplicate an existing product: you will only have to modify the information that differs from the product you want to sell. If you can't find an identical or similar product, you can create a new product from scratch. You can also read this article for more information: Create my product on Back Market's Back Office  

  • Fill in the information related to your listing (SKU, Grade, Selling price, Quantity, Delivery option): 

  • Then, validate. Congratulations, your listing has been created 🎉

⚠️ Please note that once created, your listing might take up to 48 hours to be activated if it is a new product. 

➡️ Refer to the article The different products available for sale on Back Market  to know what product or category of product you can list on our Platform.

 VIDEO TUTORIAL
